title: Is Islamophobia being re-packaged as feminism?
full_text:
Is Islamophobia being re-packaged as feminism?
Is Islamophobia being re-packaged as feminism?
A group of female activists at a far-right rally in the UK have sparked a backlash. They wore niqabs and long dresses while encouraging the crowd to condemn their clothing. So who are they? Al Jazeera’s Ava Warriner explains.
Published On 21 May 2026
